name: agent-lint
description: Static analysis & quality scoring for AI coding agent context artifacts (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, skills, rules, workflows, plans). Fully deterministic — no LLM, no database, no auth.

tools.name: analyze_artifact
tools.description: Analyze a single AI agent context artifact and return quality scores across 12 metrics

tools.name: analyze_workspace_artifacts
tools.description: Scan a workspace directory for AI agent artifacts with framework detection

tools.name: analyze_context_bundle
tools.description: Analyze multiple artifacts together for cross-artifact consistency

tools.name: prepare_artifact_fix_context
tools.description: Prepare context for an artifact improvement loop

tools.name: submit_client_assessment
tools.description: Submit a client LLM assessment with evidence-backed scores

tools.name: quality_gate_artifact
tools.description: Check if an artifact meets a target quality score

tools.name: suggest_patch
tools.description: Generate patch suggestions to improve an artifact

tools.name: apply_patches
tools.description: Apply patch content to local files with hash-guard, extension allowlist, and backup protection

tools.name: validate_export
tools.description: Validate final artifact output for safety and correctness

resources.name: agentlint-quality-metrics
resources.description: Quality and scoring metrics for each artifact type

resources.name: agentlint-prompt-pack
resources.description: Prompt pack text used for artifact creation and fixing

resources.name: agentlint-prompt-template
resources.description: Judge prompt template used for analysis

resources.name: agentlint-artifact-path-hints
resources.description: Cross-client file path aliases and discovery hints

resources.name: agentlint-artifact-spec
resources.description: Structured specification and quality requirements for artifact creation

resources.name: agentlint-scoring-policy
resources.description: Client-led metric weighting and hybrid score formula by artifact type

resources.name: agentlint-improvement-playbook
resources.description: Iteration guidance for client-driven artifact improvement loops

prompts.name: artifact_create_prompt
prompts.description: Guided prompt to create AGENTS/skills/rules/workflows/plans content with Agent Lint quality criteria

prompts.name: artifact_review_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for reviewing existing artifact content and enforcing Agent Lint quality standards

prompts.name: artifact_fix_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt for fixing low-scoring artifact content using Agent Lint quality metrics and patch flow
